title: US Treasury plans to redirect Iranian frozen assets to Gulf allies for reconstruction — Bessent directs damage assessment team
snippet: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent directed team to assess costs for damage already inflicted on Gulf allies by Iran. Treasury will 'utilize all tools available to allow Iranian assets to be made available to our Gulf allies to support rebuilding and repairs.' Assets could include frozen bank accounts and seized tankers. Announced Saturday, one day after IRGC BM attacks on Kuwait/Bahrain. Directly opposes Iran's $24B demand.
tag_reason: New US policy initiative — redirecting Iranian assets to Gulf allies, first reporting

entities.name: US Treasury Frozen Assets Redirect Plan
